title: Bulk Adding Columns
excerpt: We are still updating our processes, I need to add 3 columns to each of our 50 boards. Is there a way to do this without having to add them to each board individually?

posts.author: Southernbks (Tori Breen)
posts.cookedHtml: We are still updating our processes, I need to add 3 columns to each of our 50 boards. Is there a way to do this without having to add them to each board individually?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Southernbks,

As of today, there is no way to add the same columns in multiple boards with one request via API.

Let me know if you have any other questions

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Southernbks (Tori Breen)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you! So I will have to go into the 50+ boards and add them individually?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @Southernbks,

That is the case right now

posts.author: QSolana (Quin Do)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be great, massive time saver. The next step would be if when adding the columns it adds it to your move automations between boards.
